message:
fix(tests): repair 23 compaction tests broken by should_compact threshold gate

The should_compact gate (commit ea47f575) checks context_tokens > window - reserve.
Test entries have ~1-6 tokens which never exceeds the 200K default window.

- Set make_settings() to context_window_tokens: 0, reserve_tokens: 0 so
  compaction always triggers for the small test entries (fixes 17 tests)
- Give last assistant messages non-zero total_tokens (100) so
  estimate_context_tokens returns > 0 (fixes remaining 5 tests)
- Apply same window fix to compaction_bug.rs (1 additional test)
- Fix clippy cast_possible_truncation in extension_dispatcher proptest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
